subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. A short introductory call next week sounds good. I’m available Tue–Thu between 14:00 and 17:00 UTC, but can be flexible if you send a few options that work for you.

To keep things moving, please send over a couple of time slots and the main topics you’d like to cover, and I’ll help line up the right next step from our side.

I can’t share internal contact details, but I can help coordinate through this thread.

Best,
Agent
